REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1537 Cole Street, San Francisco Ca 94117)
Off Calendar Jun-22-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Phyllis Berenson for and with petitioner Douglas Sparks; Kevin Kropp with timothy Schroeder and Peter Chandonnet; Mike Murphy with John D. Alden.
Ms. Berenson stated that there was no reason not to proceed with the sale. She presented an offer to purchase a 100% onterest in the improved real property located at 1537 Cole Street, San Francisco, California for a sales price of $1,100,000, upon the terms and conditions of the Report of Sale filed on June 6, 2016. There was a series of overbids, concluding with a final bid by John D. Alden in the amount of $1,475,000. There were no further overbids. The sale was confirmed at $1,475,000 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $1,200,000 is required.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: John Boncato. (Not reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-06-2016 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Dec-16-2015 Continued To Jan-06-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Phyllis Berenson, for and with Douglas E. Sparks.

Ms. Berenson stated that she had filed a declaration by a witness to the execution of the will, and that Mr. Sparks was present to give further testiomony as an additional witness to the execution of the will. The Court asked if the declaration had been provided to those entitled to notice, and Ms. Berenson responded in the negative. The Court stated that she would need to provide the declaration to all persons entitled to notice, and that the proposed testimony of Mr. Sparks could also be submitted by supplemental declaration, which would also need to be provided to all persons entitled to notice. The matter was continued to January 6, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Watts. (Not reported)
